name: NARI Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: NARI Technology Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides power intelligence solutions in China and internationally. It offers smart substation automation, smart dispatching, smart distribution, and smart utilization solutions. The company also provides SCADA/EMS/WAMS, renewable energy and power electronics, and industrial process control equipment. NARI Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Nanjing, China.
